name: Troll Limb

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.text: If the unicorn fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The unicorn has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

text:
# Troll Limb

*Large Celestial, Lawful Good*

### Actions

**Hooves.** Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

**Radiant Horn.** Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) Radiant damage.
